QuickBooks reviews

TrustScore 3.9

Billing problem resolved

Support fixed my billing problem after I sent screenshots, and the case notes were clear.

January 1, 2026

Payroll setup was painful

Payroll setup took three calls and the checklist missed state tax steps for my company.

January 2, 2026

Reliable invoice reminders

Automatic invoice reminders helped us collect late payments without extra admin work.

January 3, 2026

Mobile app is limited

The mobile app is fine for receipts, but editing reports from my phone is too limited.

January 4, 2026

Bank feed disconnects

Our bank feed disconnects every few weeks and duplicate transactions appear after reconnecting.

January 5, 2026

Easy accountant collaboration

Accountant access is simple and saves us from emailing spreadsheets at month end.

January 6, 2026

Price increased too much

The subscription price went up again, and the new plan does not add features we use.

January 7, 2026

Good receipt capture

Receipt capture reads vendors accurately enough that my weekly expense review is faster.

January 8, 2026

Reports are hard to customize

Standard reports are useful, but custom fields disappear when I export to CSV.

January 9, 2026

Cancellation was frustrating

I cancelled online but was still charged the next month and had to call twice.

January 10, 2026

Inventory tracking works

Inventory tracking is clear enough for our small warehouse and purchase orders match invoices.

January 11, 2026

Import errors were vague

The desktop import failed twice with vague errors and no row-level explanation.

January 12, 2026

Sales tax automation helps

Sales tax automation keeps rates current across states and reduces manual checks.

January 13, 2026

Chat support was scripted

Chat support repeated help articles and did not understand the reconciliation issue.

January 14, 2026

Dashboard gives quick view

The dashboard gives me a fast view of cash flow, overdue invoices, and expenses.

January 15, 2026

Multi-currency is confusing

Multi-currency entries work, but exchange adjustments are hard to explain to clients.

January 16, 2026

Good onboarding videos

The onboarding videos helped my assistant learn estimates and deposits in one afternoon.

January 17, 2026

Slow during close

Pages load slowly during month-end close, especially when switching between reports.

January 18, 2026

Useful integrations

The payment and time tracking integrations reduced duplicate entry for our service team.

January 19, 2026

Permissions need more detail

User permissions are too broad, and I want separate access for payroll and banking.

January 20, 2026
